title: GreenLang Factor Source Object v1.0
description: Canonical metadata record for an upstream source that produces one or more GreenLang factor records. A single Source row MUST exist for every distinct combination of (authority, dataset_version). Factor records reference the source via (source_id, source_version). Frozen v1.0 — 2026-04-22 (FR8).

source_id.description: Stable unique identifier of the source (e.g., 'EPA_eGRID', 'DEFRA_GHG_CF', 'IEA_EF', 'SFC_GLEC_Framework'). Used as the join key from factor_record.source_id. For customer-private overlays MUST be of the form 'tenant:<uuid>'.

authority.description: Legal / institutional authority that sanctions the data (e.g., 'US Environmental Protection Agency', 'UK Department for Environment, Food & Rural Affairs', 'International Energy Agency', 'Smart Freight Centre', 'IPCC WGI').

title.description: Full publication title as it appears on the source document (e.g., 'eGRID2024 Summary Tables', 'UK Government GHG Conversion Factors for Company Reporting 2024').

publisher.description: Publishing body of the title (may differ from authority, e.g., authority=US EPA, publisher=US EPA Office of Atmospheric Protection).

jurisdiction.description: Geographic scope the source covers. Use 'XX' for global / international standards.

dataset_version.description: Version / release tag of this source dataset (e.g., '2024.1', 'v9.0', 'AR6-2021'). Referenced by factor_record.source_version. Pinning MUST be exact for reproducibility (non-negotiable #5).

publication_date.description: ISO 8601 date the dataset was published by the authority.

from.description: First calendar date this source dataset applies to.

to.description: Last calendar date this source applies to. Use null or '9999-12-31' for open-ended. MUST be >= from when non-null.

validity_period.description: Validity window of the source dataset. Individual factor records may carry a narrower window, but MUST fall inside this envelope.

ingestion_date.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when GreenLang first ingested this source version into the catalog.

source_type.description: Nature of the authority. Combined with redistribution_class it determines the SKU tier the source is billed under.

redistribution_class.description: License class for the factor data derived from this source. 'open' = freely redistributable; 'licensed_embedded' = licensed but we may serve to our customers under our license; 'customer_private' = tenant-only overlay, never cross-tenant (non-negotiable #4); 'oem_redistributable' = customer can resell under our OEM agreement.

verification_status.description: Independent verification level of the SOURCE (not of individual records). 'regulator_approved' means the authority itself is a regulator (e.g., EPA, EEA) and the data carries statutory weight.

citation_text.description: Human-readable citation string surfaced by the /explain endpoint and in PDF/HTML reports. APA-ish style recommended: 'US EPA (2024). eGRID2024 Summary Tables. Retrieved 2026-04-10 from https://www.epa.gov/egrid'.

change_log_uri.description: URI to the authority's change log / release notes for this dataset_version. Used by the Annual Refresh workflow to detect mid-year patches.

legal_notes.description: Free-text legal notices (e.g., 'Subject to GLEC Framework commercial sublicense; embed attribution in any derived output').

license_name.description: SPDX identifier or proprietary license name (e.g., 'CC-BY-4.0', 'OGL-UK-3.0', 'US-Gov-PD', 'SFC-GLEC-Commercial').

license_url.description: Canonical URL of the license terms.

attribution_required.description: When true, any downstream output derived from this source MUST carry the citation_text.

attribution_text.description: Prescribed attribution line to embed when attribution_required is true.

retrieval_uri.description: Authoritative URL from which this dataset_version was retrieved.

raw_payload_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of the originally-downloaded payload, for tamper-evidence.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code. Use 'XX' for global / unspecified.

grid_region.description: Grid sub-region, only populated for electricity sources.
